basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 20-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Electronics & Instrumentation, Physics or equivalent with at least 60% marks, or, Bachelor's degree (minimum four years) in Electronics & Instrumentation, Engineering Physics or equivalent with at least 70% marks. Qualified National Eligibility Test.
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree in Electronics & Instrumentation, Physics or equivalent with at least 60% marks in the qualifying degree, OR Bachelor's degree (minimum four years in person) in Electronics & Instrumentation, Engineering Physics or equivalent with at least 70% marks in the qualifying degree. Qualified National Eligibility Test. Candidates with knowledge of electronic circuit design and fabrication, sensor development, automation and instrumentation will be preferred. The requirement of NET/GATE examination for the selection to the post of JRF/SRF may be relaxed for the candidates who have graduated from Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with a CGPA of more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Postgraduate degree in Electronics & Instrumentation, Physics or equivalent with at least 60% marks in the qualifying degree, OR Bachelor's degree (minimum four years in person) in Electronics & Instrumentation, Engineering Physics or equivalent with at least 70% marks in the qualifying degree. Qualified National Eligibility Test. Candidates with knowledge of electronic circuit design and fabrication, sensor development, automation and instrumentation will be preferred. The requirement of NET/GATE examination for the selection to the post of JRF/SRF may be relaxed for the candidates who have graduated from Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with a CGPA of more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 20th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: You need a Postgraduate degree in Electronics & Instrumentation, Physics or equivalent with at least 60% marks, or a Bachelor's degree (minimum four years) with at least 70% marks. You must also have qualified the National Eligibility Test.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000 per month, plus 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this job?
faq.answer: The application mode for this position is via Email. You need to send your application to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. Does IIT Delhi offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITD/IRD/168/2026.

faq.question: Q9. Are candidates with specific technical knowledge preferred?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with knowledge of electronic circuit design and fabrication, sensor development, automation, and instrumentation will be preferred.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from Centrally Funded Technical Institutes (CFTIs) with a high CGPA apply even if they haven't qualified NET/GATE?
faq.answer: Yes, the requirement of NET/GATE may be relaxed for candidates from CFTIs who have a CGPA of more than 8.000 (80% aggregate marks).
